basket_summary.narrative: 26 of 44 symbols remain above the 200 SMA, 20 are above the 50 SMA, and 17 have RSI above 50. 1 have just reclaimed the 20 EMA, while 1 pass the full first-pass screen. That gives you a tighter shortlist than using moving averages alone.

symbols.story: ABG.JO still has a supportive longer-term structure, but the stock is in a pullback or repair phase rather than a clean upswing. Momentum is constructive and volume confirmation is high participation. MACD is confirming improving momentum.
symbols.caution: If the pullback continues and the 200 SMA breaks, the bigger-picture read worsens materially.
symbols.strengthen_next: Reclaim the 20 EMA first, then the 50 SMA.
symbols.weaken_next: Stay pinned under the 20 EMA and drift down toward the 200 SMA.

symbols.notes: Current open holdings have an average purchase price of 3312. Trimmed position by 50%
symbols.story: ADH.JO still has a supportive longer-term structure, but the stock is in a pullback or repair phase rather than a clean upswing. Momentum is neutral and volume confirmation is light. MACD is still leaning bearish, so momentum repair is incomplete.
symbols.caution: If the pullback continues and the 200 SMA breaks, the bigger-picture read worsens materially.
symbols.strengthen_next: Reclaim the 20 EMA first, then the 50 SMA.
symbols.weaken_next: Stay pinned under the 20 EMA and drift down toward the 200 SMA.

symbols.story: AGL.JO is aligned across the bigger trend and the nearer-term trend, with momentum on its side. Volume confirmation is light. MACD is still leaning bearish, so momentum repair is incomplete.
symbols.caution: Short-term strength can still fail if momentum rolls over quickly.
symbols.strengthen_next: Hold above the 20 EMA and continue separating above the 50 SMA.
symbols.weaken_next: Slip back under the 20 EMA and then lose the 50 SMA.

symbols.notes: Current open holdings have an average purchase price of 106229
symbols.story: ANH.JO has mixed evidence across the trend layers, so the setup is not decisive yet. Momentum is neutral and volume confirmation is light. MACD is still leaning bearish, so momentum repair is incomplete.
symbols.caution: Mixed charts can create false starts in both directions.
symbols.strengthen_next: Let short-term price action start agreeing with the broader trend.
symbols.weaken_next: Let the weaker trend layer take control of the chart.

symbols.story: APN.JO passes the current first-pass screen: it is above both long- and medium-term trend lines, RSI is on the constructive side of 50, and price has just reclaimed the 20 EMA. MACD is still leaning bearish, so momentum repair is incomplete.
symbols.caution: A fresh reclaim is an early timing event, so it needs follow-through rather than a one-day burst.
symbols.strengthen_next: Stay above the 20 EMA, keep RSI above 50, and expand above the 50 SMA.
symbols.weaken_next: Lose the 20 EMA quickly or let RSI slip back below 50.

symbols.story: AVI.JO is operating below its long-term trend line, so the chart is in repair mode rather than in a healthy trend. Momentum is weak. MACD is confirming improving momentum.
